business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-HCHP-2025-3350 shown on application. Prior insurance history lists 2024 Travelers Companies premium 686236.25 with 11 claims and no cancellation; 2023 Markel Corporation premium 619820.26 with 3 claims and no cancellation; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group premium 607294.45 with 6 claims and cancellation yes.

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Quality control / quality assurance program in place
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
concerns: Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) are permitted
EV charging stations installed on the premises
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Cyber liability protections not in place
Prior insurance history shows multiple claims over three years
One prior policy year indicates cancellation
Electrical system update noted as original (2005)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history on page 2 shows 11 claims in 2024 with Travelers Companies, 3 claims in 2023 with Markel Corporation, and 6 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. 2022 indicates a cancellation; 2023 and 2024 indicate no cancellation.
